approval.note: Every mutating action pauses for explicit human approval before execution. Enforced by the future Hermes runtime; declarative here. pack-audit requires every write tool to set requires_approval: true.

budget_caps.note: Per-client caps resolved from clients/<client>/binding. The runtime must refuse (or re-prompt for approval on) any budget change that exceeds the client's cap.

notes: Money-spending domain (risk_tier: critical). Read tools run without approval; write tools (budget/status/create) require human approval and are declared with requires_approval: true.
